description: 用and连接两个并列的名词。
examples_json: [{"en":"I bought apples and oranges.","zh":"我买了苹果和橙子。"}]
[{"en":"She is young but very wise.","zh":"她年轻但很有智慧。"}]

text: Do you want coffee or tea?
examples_json: [{"en":"Should we go now or later?","zh":"我们应该现在去还是晚点去？"}]

text: I was tired so I went home.
examples_json: [{"en":"It was late so we left.","zh":"很晚了所以我们离开了。"}]

text: It's raining however we'll go out.
meaning: 下雨了但我们还是要出去。
examples_json: [{"en":"The price is high; however the quality is good.","zh":"价格高但质量好。"}]

text: She likes pop whereas I prefer rock.
meaning: 她喜欢流行而我喜欢摇滚。
examples_json: [{"en":"My brother is tall whereas I am short.","zh":"我哥哥很高而我很矮。"}]

text: She is tired yet she keeps working.
examples_json: [{"en":"He failed yet he didn't give up.","zh":"他失败了却没有放弃。"}]

text: I stayed home because I was sick.
meaning: 我待在家里因为我病了。
examples_json: [{"en":"I called him because I missed him.","zh":"我打电话给他因为我想他。"}]

meaning: 既然你来了我们开始吧。
description: 用since表示已知原因放句首。
examples_json: [{"en":"Since everyone is ready let's go.","zh":"既然大家都准备好了我们走吧。"}]

text: He was late therefore he missed the bus.
meaning: 他迟到了因此错过了公交车。
examples_json: [{"en":"She studied hard; therefore she passed.","zh":"她努力学习因此通过了。"}]

text: Although it rained we had fun.
meaning: 虽然下雨了我们玩得很开心。
examples_json: [{"en":"Although he is old he is active.","zh":"虽然他年纪大了但很活跃。"}]

text: Even though she was scared she spoke.
meaning: 尽管害怕她还是发言了。
examples_json: [{"en":"Even though it was hard he finished.","zh":"尽管很难他还是完成了。"}]

text: Despite the rain we went out.
meaning: 尽管下雨我们还是出去了。
examples_json: [{"en":"Despite his injury he played on.","zh":"尽管受伤了他继续比赛。"}]

text: When I arrived they were eating.
meaning: 我到达时他们正在吃饭。
examples_json: [{"en":"When she called I was sleeping.","zh":"她打电话时我正在睡觉。"}]

text: If it rains we'll stay home.
meaning: 如果下雨我们就待在家。
examples_json: [{"en":"If you study you'll pass.","zh":"如果你学习就会通过。"}]

text: You won't pass unless you study.
meaning: 除非你学习否则不会通过。
examples_json: [{"en":"I won't go unless she invites me.","zh":"除非她邀请我否则我不去。"}]

text: The girl who sang is my sister.
description: 用who引导修饰人的定语从句。
examples_json: [{"en":"The man who helped us was kind.","zh":"帮助我们的那个人很善良。"}]

text: The book which I read was great.
description: 用which引导修饰物的定语从句。
examples_json: [{"en":"The movie which won the award was excellent.","zh":"获奖的那部电影很出色。"}]

text: The movie that I saw was boring.
meaning: 我看的那部电影很无聊。
examples_json: [{"en":"The car that I bought is red.","zh":"我买的那辆车是红色的。"}]
